commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `extensions/memory-lancedb` from `apache-arrow@21.1.0` to `18.1.0` and regenerates the plugin shrinkwrap plus root pnpm lockfile.

PR surface: Source +14, Config 0, Other +2. Total +16 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source and npm registry metadata show `apache-arrow@21.1.0` is outside `@lancedb/lancedb@0.30.0`'s declared peer range, matching the npm 11 install failure reported in the linked issue.

target.title: fix(memory-lancedb): align apache arrow peer dependency
target.body:
## Summary

- Pin `extensions/memory-lancedb` from `apache-arrow@21.1.0` to `18.1.0`, the highest version accepted by `@lancedb/lancedb@0.30.0`.
- Regenerate the plugin `npm-shrinkwrap.json` with the repo shrinkwrap generator so published npm installs use consistent Arrow 18 transitive metadata.
- Update the root `pnpm-lock.yaml` to match the package manifest.

Fixes #90295

## Real Behavior Proof

Behavior addressed: `@openclaw/memory-lancedb@2026.6.1` could not install under npm 11 because it declared `apache-arrow@21.1.0` while `@lancedb/lancedb@0.30.0` only accepts `apache-arrow >=15.0.0 <=18.1.0`.

Exact setup: OpenClaw source checkout on macOS, branch `tui-90295-lancedb-peer-fix`, Node/npm/pnpm already installed from the repo environment.

Dependency contract:

```bash
npm view @lancedb/lancedb@0.30.0 peerDependencies --json
```

```json
{
  "apache-arrow": ">=15.0.0 <=18.1.0"
}
```

Before lockfile update, the changed manifest was correctly rejected by frozen install, proving the old lock still referenced the bad package pair:

```text
[ERR_PNPM_OUTDATED_LOCKFILE] Cannot install with "frozen-lockfile" because pnpm-lock.yaml is not up to date with <ROOT>/extensions/memory-lancedb/package.json
* 1 dependencies are mismatched:
  - apache-arrow (lockfile: 21.1.0, manifest: 18.1.0)
```

After regenerating the lock/shrinkwrap:

```bash
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
```

```text
Scope: all 152 workspace projects
Already up to date
Done in 178ms using pnpm v11.2.2
```

```bash
node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --check --package-dir extensions/memory-lancedb
```

```text
extensions/memory-lancedb: npm-shrinkwrap.json is current.
```

```bash
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /private/tmp/openclaw-90295-install.XXXXXX)
npm install --prefix "$tmpdir" --ignore-scripts ./extensions/memory-lancedb --package-lock-only
```

```text
up to date in 187ms
```

Verification:

```bash
pnpm test extensions/memory-lancedb --reporter=dot
```

```text
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  134 passed (134)
```

```bash
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/contracts/package-manifest.contract.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/extension-runtime-dependencies.contract.test.ts --reporter=dot
```

```text
Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  430 passed (430)
```

```bash
git diff --check
```

No whitespace errors.

## Platforms Tested

- macOS local source checkout
- npm package-lock-only install path for the local `extensions/memory-lancedb` package

## Limitations

This is a minimal dependency alignment for the current `@lancedb/lancedb@0.30.0` peer contract. A future LanceDB release that supports Arrow 21 can relax this pin separately.
target.author: sahibzada-allahyar
